headline: JPMorgan Announces Cash Distributions for the JPMorgan ETFs
summary: TORONTO, May 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- J. P. Morgan Asset Management (JPMAM)* today announced the final April 2026 cash distributions for the below listed JPMorgan ETFs. The JPMorgan ETFs trade on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX). Unitholders of record on May 19, 2026 will receive cash distributions payable on May 25, 2026. Details of the “per unit” distributions are as follows: JPMorgan ETF nameTicker symbolDistribution per unit ($)Payment frequencyJPMorgan US Ultra-Short Income Active ETFJP

headline: What Happens to JPMorgan Chase If Jamie Dimon Steps Down?
summary: Jamie Dimon has given no indication he plans to leave imminently, but after more than twenty years atop JPMorgan Chase (NYSE: JPM), the question is fair. He has been CEO since December 2005, making him the longest-serving major U.S. bank CEO. His departure would test whether the franchise is the man or the institution. Why ... What Happens to JPMorgan Chase If Jamie Dimon Steps Down?

headline: JPMorgan Hikes IREN Price Target to $46 but Stays Underweight on Circular NVIDIA Deal Concerns
summary: JPMorgan Chase (NYSE:JPM) raised its price target on Iren (NASDAQ:IREN) stock to $46 from $39 while keeping an Underweight rating. The unusual combination, a price target raise paired with a bearish stance, reflects the firm’s skepticism about the structure of Iren’s blockbuster NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) partnership. headline: JPMorgan Cuts McDonald’s Price Target to $305: Is the Same-Store-Sales Story Stalling?
summary: McDonald’s (NYSE:MCD) just absorbed its second analyst price target cut in as many trading sessions. JPMorgan lowered its price target on McDonald’s stock to $305 from $325 while maintaining its Overweight rating, citing softer same-store-sales assumptions but flagging a strategic shift the firm views as constructive for long-term returns. The move follows KeyBanc’s price target ... JPMorgan Cuts McDonald’s Price Target to $305: Is the Same-Store-Sales Story Stalling?

headline: Capital One flags debanking fight in quarterly filing
summary: The bank “is responding to demands and requests” related to “fair access to banking,” it said. The Trump Organization has until July 2 to refile its claim that the bank politically debanked the president.

content.title: Capital One flags debanking fight in quarterly filing
content.summary: The bank “is responding to demands and requests” related to “fair access to banking,” it said. The Trump Organization has until July 2 to refile its claim that the bank politically debanked the president.

thumbnail.caption: The Capital One Financial Corporation headquarters buildings in Tysons Corner, Virginia on Sept. 21, 2022. The bank's software division rolled out a tokenization-based data security this year that's now integrated with Snowflake and Databricks.
